vocab.example: I rely heavily on noise-canceling technology to block out the cacophony of the city during my daily commute.

vocab.meaning: đắm mình vào cái gì đó
vocab.example: Wearing headphones allows me to immerse myself in a podcast and forget about the bustling environment around me.

vocab.meaning: những sự xao nhãng không mong muốn
vocab.example: I find that listening to lo-fi beats helps me filter out unwanted distractions when I'm trying to focus in a crowded cafe.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác riêng tư, biệt lập
vocab.example: Putting on my earbuds creates a sense of solitude, even when I am surrounded by hundreds of people in the subway.

vocab.meaning: một món phụ kiện không thể thiếu
vocab.example: My wireless headphones have become an indispensable accessory whenever I head out for a long walk or a gym session.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn về thính giác (không gian âm thanh riêng tư)
vocab.example: In a noisy public square, my headphones provide a personal auditory sanctuary where I can truly relax.

vocab.meaning: duy trì sự nhận biết về không gian xung quanh
vocab.example: While I love music, I often use transparency mode to maintain spatial awareness and stay safe from traffic.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn những tương tác không mong muốn
vocab.example: Sometimes I wear headphones just to deter unwanted interactions from strangers when I'm not in the mood for small talk.

vocab.meaning: âm thanh trong trẻo, sắc nét
vocab.example: The crystal-clear audio quality makes listening to classical music in public a truly sublime experience.

vocab.meaning: phép tắc/phép lịch sự nơi công cộng
vocab.example: I always keep the volume at a moderate level out of respect for public etiquette and to avoid disturbing others.
